Nodes.Text: Hm? A visitor. The village rarely sends anyone up my hill. Speak, then — the wind's getting cold.

Choices.Text: [Deliver] The baker dreamed of the old flood again.

Nodes.Text: ...the old flood. So. I had hoped that dream had drowned with the rest. Tell the baker I heard, and that I'll do what must be done. Go safely down the hill.
Then pass. The hill keeps its own counsel.
